## Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened. Include screenshots or logs if helpful.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. macOS 14]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 123]
- Node version: [e.g. 20.x]
- Branch/Commit: [e.g. sprint-1 / abc123]

## Logs
```
Paste relevant logs, console output, or stack traces here
```

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.
